data.content: Plan approved. Root cause is correct: beat detail lightbox fetches a beat without _repoPath, so Take! can start a session without repo scope and route to the wrong backend. Recommended implementation is the minimal lightbox fix: pass repo context through onShipBeat by annotating the fetched beat with _repoPath when repo is available. Preserve existing beats-table behavior. During implementation, add a focused regression test covering the detail-lightbox Take! path with repo context, not just manual verification, and run the standard test suite afterward.
